title: Dedicated Shareable Metrics Detail Page with Public Metric ID
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want to share a direct link to a specific metric with colleagues, so that we can collaborate on metric definitions and details without navigating through the full metrics page.
description:
Create a dedicated metric detail page accessible via a shareable URL like `datatoolspro.com/metrics/{publicMetricId}`.

### Requirements
- Full-page metric detail view with room for expanded tools and information
- Public metric ID (similar to existing user/account IDs) for URL-based sharing
- URL supports action query parameters (e.g., `?action=alias`, `?action=report`)
- Existing sidebar/popout on the metrics list page must be preserved
- The new page supplements (not replaces) the existing slide-out metric detail view

### Design Decision
A dedicated page was chosen over expanding the modal/slide-out because the scope of metric information and tools is growing. The popout remains for quick browsing on the metrics list page.
acceptance_criteria: Page shows full metric details including aliases and reports
Existing sidebar popout on the metrics list page is preserved
Action query parameters route to the correct metric detail section
ux_changes: New dedicated metrics detail page with full-width layout. Metric name link opens the detail page. Existing slide-out popout on the metrics list page is preserved.
middleware_changes: New route handler for /metrics/{publicMetricId} with action parameter support.
data_model_changes: Public metric ID field added for URL-based metric identification.
implementation_notes: Developer created a separate page at /metrics/{metricId} with action query parameters for different views (aliases, reports). The existing sidebar popout was temporarily removed during development but restored as requested. This page serves as a starting point for future metric detail enhancements.
comment_summary: Developer agreed a separate page was the right approach and implemented it quickly. Reporter requested the existing sidebar popout be restored alongside the new page. Developer restored it and the ticket was marked complete.
